fault_type: region_pending, io_util, raft_apply_wait, tidb, io fault
symptom_vector: IO fault manifesting as filesystem call errors, read/write operation errors, permission denied errors, and file descriptor errors.

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: Component [tidb-tikv] experienced [region_pending, io_util, raft_apply_wait, tidb, io] fault.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [tidb-tikv] (From Ground Truth instance field, and it appears in Full Context metric data as service_name 'tidb-tikv').

Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [productcatalogservice] in Trace data showing latency anomalies (e.g., in Full Context, trace data indicates average duration for productcatalogservice operations increased from ~10s to 38-118s).

Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [region_pending] in Metric data with abnormal surge (e.g., in Full Context, metric data shows region_pending median increased from 8977.5 to 1666.0, change rate 1.37x, and P99 from 11819.25 to 1936.56, change rate 1.44x).
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [io_util] in Metric data with changes (e.g., in Full Context, metric data shows io_util P99 increased from 0.09 to 0.22).

Step 5: Derive Root Cause - Based on the presence of these keywords and their anomalies in Full Context, determined the cause is [region_pending, io_util, raft_apply_wait, tidb, io] fault as per key_metrics from Ground Truth.
